codeReview.summary: The packet materially reduced duplicate-posting risk by removing GRN-side account-bearing event publication and teaching the inventory listener to skip canonical workflow-owned boundaries. The regression and invariant updates provide direct evidence that GRN stays stock-only until purchase-invoice posting and that listener-side duplicates are suppressed.

summary: Pass. Canonical posting ownership is clearer after the listener containment changes, and the updated regression/invariant suites back the behavior.
